description_long: This is a square table constructed from light tan, pixelated wooden planks, reminiscent of the visual style found in Minecraft. The tabletop features a recessed central area with a glass or transparent panel, bordered by a thick wooden frame. The table stands on four sturdy, blocky legs, each positioned at the corners and matching the tabletop's wood texture. The glass insert is segmented, with visible pixelated lines suggesting a paneled or gridded design. The overall build is robust and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or attached seating. The table's design is simple and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments.
description: A square, blocky wooden table with a central glass panel and four sturdy legs, featuring a pixelated, tan wood texture. The design is simple and functional, with a recessed glass insert in the tabletop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop with a central glass panel and two front legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the glass panel and two side legs visible, highlighting the same blocky structure as the front.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the glass panel and rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the glass panel and two side legs visible.
